# Popover

Displays interactive floating content from a trigger.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/popover
```

## Examples

```tsx
<Popover.Root>
  <Popover.Trigger>Open</Popover.Trigger>
  <Popover.Content>Interactive content</Popover.Content>
</Popover.Root>
```

```tsx
<Popover.Content aria-label="Project settings">
  <Popover.Close>Close</Popover.Close>
</Popover.Content>
```

```tsx
<Popover.Content side="bottom">Positioned below the trigger</Popover.Content>
```

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/popover.json`
- Recipe: `popover`
- Files: `src/components/ui/popover.tsx`
